reply.text: Ok serious question why are you not banned from car rides yet

messages.text: sunlight is innocent, you the real traffic violation
nah those airbags got their own gravitational pull
ur just mad the seatbelt chose me
seatbelt fighting for its life back there
it signed up for a character building arc
you talk big, can you back it
both, that backseat got me rethinking my beliefs
which one, road safety or celibacy of vision
road safety, vision already sinned when i opened the story
u clicked knowing it was a crash course
yeah but i didnt expect the final boss
blue bikini dlc pack, difficulty set to disrespectful
drinks sunday. i'm choosing the place
